rationale: Review 2 identifies the more consequential placement problem: all public declarations are generic bialgebra/Hopf-algebra results with no algebraic-geometry content, confirmed by the diff (no Spec/GrpObj/AffineScheme anywhere), making AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean the wrong home. Review 1's finding (antipode_convMul_id should be private) is correct but minor and doesn't address the file-level mislocation that Review 2 catches.
